tu.prop: Whole-poem fallback because Chinese and English stanza structures do not align safely.

tuv.seg: 蜉蝣之羽，衣裳楚楚。心之憂矣，於我歸處。 蜉蝣之翼，采采衣服。心之憂矣，於我歸息。 蜉蝣掘閱，麻衣如雪。心之憂矣，於我歸說。

1 The wings of the ephemera Are robes, bright and splendid. Would they but come and abide with me!
2 The wings of the ephemera Are robes, variously adorned. Would they but come and rest with me!
3 The ephemera bursts from its hole, With a robe of hemp like snow. My heart is grieved; — Would they but come and lodge with me!
